title.en: Pick your England XI to face DR Congo at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 选择您的英格兰XI在世界杯上面对刚果民主共和国

summary.en: Who should start for England against DR Congo in their last-32 tie? It's time to put yourself in Thomas Tuchel's shoes.
summary.zh-CN: 谁应该在最后32场比赛中首发英格兰对阵刚果民主共和国？是时候站在Thomas Tuchel的立场了。

title.en: Has football fever taken hold in the US?
title.zh-CN: 足球热在美国蔓延了吗？

summary.en: With the World Cup now three weeks old, BBC Sport's reporters in the US look at how their perceptions have changed.
summary.zh-CN: 随着世界杯现在已经举办了三周， BBC体育在美国的记者们着眼于他们的看法是如何改变的。

title.en: I'd have done the same to get him sent off - 20 years since Rooney's red card
title.zh-CN: 我本来也会做同样的事情让他被罚下场-鲁尼红牌20年后

summary.en: Former England striker Wayne Rooney talks about his red card in the 2006 World Cup quarter-final against Portugal, and the reaction of his then teammate Cristiano Ronaldo.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰前锋韦恩·鲁尼谈到了他在2006年世界杯四分之一决赛对阵葡萄牙的红牌，以及当时的队友克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的反应。

title.en: Hincapie second player to be sent off for covering mouth
title.zh-CN: Hincapie第二个因捂住嘴而被送走的玩家

summary.en: Ecuador defender Piero Hincapie becomes the second player at this tournament to be shown a red card for covering his mouth while speaking to an opponent in stoppage time of their 2-0 defeat against...
summary.zh-CN: 厄瓜多尔后卫皮耶罗·辛卡皮（ Piero Hincapie ）成为本届锦标赛中第二位因在2-0击败对手的停赛时间与对手交谈时捂住嘴而被出示红牌的球员...

title.en: 'The Azteca erupts!' Quinones fires Mexico into lead
title.zh-CN: “阿兹特克火山爆发！”奎诺内斯向墨西哥发射铅弹

summary.en: Julian Quinones times his run to perfection before rifling home a fierce shot to give Mexico the lead against Ecuador in their round of 32 World Cup match.
summary.zh-CN: 朱利安·奎诺内斯（ Julian Quinones ）在完美的比赛中表现出色，然后在32轮世界杯比赛中猛烈射门，让墨西哥队在对阵厄瓜多尔的比赛中领先。

title.en: Quiz: Name every team England have played in World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 测验：列出英格兰队在世界杯淘汰赛中打过的每支球队

summary.en: England and Thomas Tuchel will want to match the achievements of the nation's famous side that lifted the World Cup trophy in 1966. Can you name every side they have ever faced in the knockouts?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰和托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）将希望与1966年举起世界杯奖杯的国家著名球队的成就相提并论。你能说出他们在淘汰赛中遇到的每一方吗？

title.en: Mexico rampant at fortress Azteca - and England could be next
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥阿兹特克堡垒猖獗-英格兰可能是下一个

summary.en: Mexico have won all four games and not conceded a goal at this World Cup. Their last-16 opponents must also contend with playing at the Azteca Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 墨西哥赢得了所有四场比赛，并且在本届世界杯上没有失球。他们的最后16名对手也必须在阿兹特克体育场比赛。

title.en: Hincapie becomes second player sent off for covering mouth
title.zh-CN: Hincapie成为因捂嘴而被罚的第二名玩家

summary.en: Ecuador defender Piero Hincapie became the second player at the World Cup to be dismissed for covering his mouth while confronting an opponent.
summary.zh-CN: 厄瓜多尔后卫皮耶罗·辛卡皮（ Piero Hincapie ）成为世界杯上第二位因在与对手对抗时捂住嘴而被解雇的球员。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 24
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星24号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Egypt optimistic Salah will be fit to face Australia
title.zh-CN: 埃及乐观的萨拉赫将适合面对澳大利亚

summary.en: Sources inside the Egypt camp say Mohamed Salah is winning his race to overcome a hamstring injury and play in Friday's last-32 game in Dallas.
summary.zh-CN: 埃及营地内的消息人士称，穆罕默德·萨拉赫（ Mohamed Salah ）正在赢得他的比赛，以克服腿筋受伤并参加周五在达拉斯举行的最后一场32场比赛。

title.en: Fifa explains decision to rule out Germany goal
title.zh-CN: 国际足联解释排除德国进球的决定

summary.en: Fifa says coaches and players were told before the World Cup referees will punish the type of foul that saw Germany's extra-time goal against Paraguay ruled out.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联表示，在世界杯裁判之前，教练和球员被告知将惩罚德国对阵巴拉圭的加时赛进球被排除在外的那种犯规。

title.en: More than the Score

summary.en: Cape Verde defender Sidny Lopes Cabral discusses his excitement ahead of playing Argentina
summary.zh-CN: 佛得角后卫西德尼·洛佩斯·卡布拉尔在比赛前讨论了他的兴奋

title.en: 'I remember like it was yesterday' - Euro 2016 hero Robson-Kanu
title.zh-CN: “我记得就像昨天一样” - 2016年欧洲杯英雄罗布森-卡努

summary.en: Hal Robson-Kanu reflects on scoring his iconic goal for Wales against Belgium at Euro 2016, 10 years to the day from the quarter-final in Lille.
summary.zh-CN: 哈尔·罗布森-卡努（ Hal Robson-Kanu ）在2016年欧洲杯上为威尔士队打进了他的标志性进球，距离里尔四分之一决赛还有10年。

title.en: Neville: France 'a level above' and Mbappe 'on verge of greatness'
title.zh-CN: 内维尔：法国“领先一步” ，姆巴佩“濒临伟大”

summary.en: Gary Neville says France are "a level above" any other team at the World Cup after they cruised to a 3-0 win against Sweden in the round of 32.
summary.zh-CN: 加里·内维尔（ Gary Neville ）表示，法国队在32轮比赛中以3-0战胜瑞典队后，在世界杯上“高于”任何其他球队。

title.en: Who is Pep Chavarria and why do Chelsea want the Spanish left-back?
title.zh-CN: 谁是Pep Chavarria ，为什么切尔西想要西班牙左后卫？

summary.en: Pep Chavarria is certainly not your typical Chelsea signing. He did not make his debut in Spain’s top flight until he was 24 years old. His European bow came aged 27 in October in the UEFA...
summary.zh-CN: Pep Chavarria肯定不是你典型的切尔西签约。他直到24岁才在西班牙顶级联赛中首次亮相。他在欧洲的弓于10月份在欧足联27岁...

title.en: Mexico storm into World Cup last 16 to book potential England clash

summary.en: A trip to the Azteca Stadium awaits England if they beat DR Congo on Wednesday after Mexico strolled past Ecuador 2-0 to reach the last 16 of the World Cup.

summary.en: On the eve of their last-32 game with Austria, Spain’s unassuming midfielder explains their team spirit and about finding his rhythm after injuryAt the Embassy Suites on Broad Street, downtown...

title.en: Belgium’s leaders backed to disprove ‘has-beens’ tag in Senegal challenge

summary.en: Rudi Garcia railed against criticism of his side, who face Senegal in the last 32 with a spring in their step after the 5-1 hammering of New ZealandBelgium had just beaten New Zealand 5-1 to secure...

summary.en: In this week’s newsletter we speak to the Lionesses’ record scorer, who has been inducted to the hall of fame at the National Football MuseumFor a generation of England fans she was the talismanic...

title.en: Liverpool complete £60m Jacquet deal as Chelsea tie up £47m Palestra move

summary.en: 20-year-old centre-back moves to Anfield from RennesItalian right-back signs seven-year deal at BluesJérémy Jacquet has officially completed his £60m move to Liverpool from Rennes, while Chelsea have...

title.en: The USMNT’s quest for World Cup glory is currency in the attention economy

summary.en: In Wednesday’s last-32 match, the US team have more than just a chance to win against Bosnia and Herzegovina. They’re playing to win over their countryIt took Mauricio Pochettino a little while to...

title.en: ‘There are holes in England’: DR Congo ready to produce World Cup shock | Ed Aarons

summary.en: Former DRC defender Gabriel Zakuani is better placed than most to have a view on Wednesday’s game, and feels it won’t be as straightforward as some thinkIt took Gabriel Zakuani less than five seconds...

title.en: Haaland the late hero as Norway knock out resilient Ivory Coast

summary.en: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland scores a late winner as Norway beat Ivory Coast 2-1 to book their place in the last 16 in the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Barcola 'emphatically' doubles France's lead over Sweden

summary.en: Bradley Barcola "empahatically" fires home France's second goal in their World Cup round of 32 match against Sweden at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

title.en: 'A moment of real quality' - Nusa's sensational strike puts Norway ahead

summary.en: Norway take the lead in their round of 32 tie against Ivory Coast after a brilliant strike from forward Antonio Nusa.

title.en: Germany beaten on penalties as Paraguay reach last 16

summary.en: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup, losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, following a 1-1 draw after extra time.

title.en: Koeman resigns, while Netherlands report racist abuse

summary.en: Ronald Koeman resigns as Netherlands manager after their World Cup exit, which led to "appalling" racist abuse aimed at players who missed penalties.

title.en: The Paraguay hero who sold his kit when his son was born

summary.en: Orlando Gill has become Paraguay's World Cup hero but was in football obscurity 18 months ago and had to sell his kit to support his family after the premature birth of his son.

title.en: Coach played mind games with Cusack before death, inquest told

summary.en: A team-mate tells an inquest Maddy Cusack was "anxious" about Jonathan Morgan joining Sheffield United.
